title: geissaspis cristata var. malabarica
intro: Geissaspis cristata var. malabarica, also known as the 'Malabar spine flower', is a flowering plant species in the family Asclepiadaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, and it is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Geissaspis cristata var. malabarica include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues.
